description_long: This is a modern, streamlined airplane with a sharply pointed nose, a forward-positioned enclosed cockpit with a large, tinted canopy, and a pair of swept-back wings mounted mid-fuselage. The wings are angular and feature pronounced leading and trailing edges, with no visible winglets. The rear of the airplane houses two large, exposed jet engines with detailed exhaust nozzles, and the tail section is equipped with a prominent vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels visible beneath the fuselage. The overall surface is smooth and metallic, with a combination of light gray and dark gray panels accentuating the aerodynamic design.
description: A sleek, modern airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The surface is smooth and metallic, featuring light and dark gray panels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin jet engines, swept-back wings, and the vertical and horizontal stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the angular wings, exposed jet engines, and the deployed landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, large cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with clear visibility of the cockpit, wings, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings, no visible winglets, and a straight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, all deployed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, single-piece canopy and apparent single-seat configuration.
